name: Supabase Auth
description: Supabase Auth (GoTrue) provides user authentication and session management via REST API. It supports email/password signup, magic links, OTP, OAuth providers, token refresh, and admin user management for Supabase projects.

auth.note: Pass your anon/public key as apikey header. For admin operations, use service_role key as Bearer token.

capabilities.name: auth_signup
capabilities.description: Register a new user with email and password. Returns user object and session tokens.

capabilities.name: auth_token_password
capabilities.description: Sign in a user with email/phone and password. Returns access and refresh tokens.

capabilities.name: auth_token_refresh
capabilities.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new access token.

capabilities.name: auth_magiclink
capabilities.description: Send a magic link to a user's email for passwordless login.

capabilities.name: auth_otp
capabilities.description: Send a one-time password via email or SMS for passwordless login.

capabilities.name: auth_verify_otp
capabilities.description: Verify an OTP or magic link token and return a session.

capabilities.name: auth_recover
capabilities.description: Send a password recovery email to the user.

capabilities.name: auth_user_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the currently authenticated user's profile.

capabilities.name: auth_user_update
capabilities.description: Update the currently authenticated user's profile, email, phone, or password.

capabilities.name: auth_logout
capabilities.description: Sign out the currently authenticated user and invalidate their session.

capabilities.name: auth_invite
capabilities.description: Invite a user by email (admin only). Sends an invitation email.

capabilities.name: auth_authorize
capabilities.description: Initiate OAuth sign-in by redirecting the user to the provider's authorization page.

capabilities.name: admin_users_list
capabilities.description: List all users in the project (admin/service_role only).

capabilities.name: admin_users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific user by ID (admin only).

capabilities.name: admin_users_create
capabilities.description: Create a new user (admin only). Can set email_confirm to skip verification.

capabilities.name: admin_users_update
capabilities.description: Update a user's profile, email, password, or metadata (admin only).

capabilities.name: admin_users_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a user by ID (admin only).
